channel.title: Default on Arjun's Webpage
channel.description: Recent content in Default on Arjun's Webpage

item.title: One Task a Day
item.description:
Stuck in a one task a day unproductive productivity regime.
Summer depression ?

item.title: Bad Financial Decision on 4 Wheels
item.description:
My plans/ideation resto-modding a Maruti Suzuki Esteem.

A baleno (the real one made before 2006) would be a simultaneous better but worse financial decision

item.title: Tyvek Wallet
item.description:
An obituary for my wallet

Tyvek is one of the coolest materials I’ve worked with. It’s a fibrous sheet of plastic that by itself it doesn’t feel like much, but when made into a wallet seems to defy the rules of physics. I carried one such Tyvek wallet for over a year. The wallet was completely made by hand and all you need to make one is a sheet of Tyvek, a trusty utility blade (that later found its place inside a concealed pocket in the wallet), a ruler and some high viscosity CA glue.

item.title: baghookthing
item.description:
A backpack holder that can hold small backpacks (like the Quechua 25L Pack I use) onto shelfs or tabletops upto 25mm thick.

In my testing it took up to 5kgs. I have printed it in PLA with 8 wall lines.

item.title: Ultimate Dahi
item.description: More fat than regular dahi.

item.title: Rot
item.description: The neural center rots.

item.description: Pictures from my first roll of 35mm film.

item.title: परछत्ती/Parchatti
item.description:
arjun - 28/07/2025, 11:55

what do you guys call this place ?

we call it parchatti

amanakeet - 01/08/2025, 08:14

Bukhari/Alyaa

item.title: Album Art

item.title: CPT
item.description:
An entry from my journal, written in a midnight writers unblock initiated by Sarveshwar Dayal Saxena

कल पेपर है। और कल चंद मिनटों में आ जाएगा।

item.title: कुत्ते - आवाज़
item.description:
सन २०२५* : कुत्ते लोगों की आवाज़ दबा रहे हैं।

*करीबन

item.title: Unregulated
item.description: I like to support the untaxed, unregulated part of the economy. I don’t haggle with Rikshawalas. They aren’t technically unregulated, they are self regulating. They are perfect order within the lack of order. Nobody decided their prices, nobody made their laws. They operate a thin plane above supply and demand. Ethics and regulations when they exist are based on their morality. They have license plates, but who’s checking ?! Even when anarchy befalls, banks, governments and their issued tokens become obsolete I bet Rikshawalas would still be roaming on their screeching whining rikshaws, charged with stolen electricity. [1] [2]

item.title: Offering
item.description:
You got one part of that wrong.

This is not meth.

Its potassium nitrate.

item.title: Hauz Khas
item.description: As of 2026 I hate south delhi.

item.description: We need more unsupervised access to nature reserves.

item.title: Dustbin
item.description:
Underrated life advice for 20 somethings

Desh ka yuva, kuda kudedaan me nahi daal pa raha.

item.title: Lal Kot
item.description:
The first walled city of Delhi.

The first walled city of the city of Delhi.

The first walled city of seven or eight or nine cities of the city of Delhi

item.title: Make Youtube Distraction Free
item.description: Over the years, it has become increasingly hard to focus on the web. With websites and serveices now being designed to make you shuttle from one red dot to another, it has become necessary for us users to preserve our integrities as users and to not become consumers. This article will guide you to removing all sorts of distractions from YouTube, a popular video sharing website which houses a library of videos ranging from casual entertainment to perhaps the best lectures in calculus. For the ones who use this as a tool to study, it is not possible to use the platform while keeping together their focus on what’s important.

item.title: Short Video Format
item.description:
Against the short video format

The short video format is a non consensual, habit forming, freedom infringing video format that destroys the users attention span. It takes away the users right to consent, delivers them trivial information in bite sized bits of novelty along with a hit of hormones.

item.title: New Site
item.description:
newsite!

using hugo this time.
